name: Tatar Altan vs Shaitan
short_description: An epic slasher about the Tatar warrior Altan and his battle with Shaitan on earth and underground.
detailed_description:
This is a simple action adventure with platformer elements. The game has more than 4 different levels where you need to defeat enemies, fight bosses and come to the final boss at the end of the game. The game also has an open world level where you can freely move and explore the world. The game uses elements of Tatar folklore and music by classical Tatar composers.

This story tells us about the Tatar warrior Altan. How he returned from distant wanderings to his native land and encountered evil forces that filled everything around. Cities, forests, fields. And he decided to cleanse his land of Evil and defeat the main enemy of people - Shaitan! But for this, our hero will have to go to the underground kingdom of evil forces.
